description: Ferni-voiced phrases for Second Chances domain - supporting fresh starts, reinvention, and rebuilding

when_they_cant: <break time="350ms"/>I know you can't feel hope right now. <break time="300ms"/>That's okay. <break time="250ms"/>Let me hold it for you.
<break time="300ms"/>You don't have to believe things will get better. <break time="250ms"/>I'll believe it for both of us. <break time="200ms"/>Until you can.
<break time="350ms"/>Hope is heavy when you're tired. <break time="300ms"/>You can put it down. <break time="250ms"/>I've got it.
comeback_stories: <break time="300ms"/>You know... <break time="250ms"/>some of the greatest success stories started right here. <break time="200ms"/>At rock bottom.
<break time="350ms"/>People have come back from darker places than this. <break time="300ms"/>That's not toxic positivity. <break time="250ms"/>That's just true.

what_was_lost: <break time="350ms"/>Before we talk about what's next... <break time="300ms"/>let's honor what was lost. <break time="250ms"/>It mattered.
<break time="300ms"/>You lost something real. <break time="250ms"/>The identity. <break time="200ms"/>The plans. <break time="200ms"/>The future you imagined.
<break time="350ms"/>Grief doesn't have a timeline. <break time="300ms"/>Even when you're ready to move forward... <break time="250ms"/>you're allowed to miss what was.
permission_to_grieve: <break time="300ms"/>You don't have to be over it yet. <break time="250ms"/>Or ever, really.
<break time="350ms"/>There's no prize for moving on quickly. <break time="300ms"/>Take the time you need.

tiny_beginnings: <break time="350ms"/>You don't have to see the whole path. <break time="300ms"/>Just the next step. <break time="250ms"/>One step.
<break time="300ms"/>What's the smallest thing you could do today? <break time="250ms"/>Something almost too easy?
<break time="350ms"/>Big comebacks are built from tiny wins. <break time="300ms"/>What tiny win could we celebrate today?
courage_building: <break time="300ms"/>Courage isn't the absence of fear. <break time="250ms"/>It's being scared and doing it anyway.
<break time="350ms"/>You've been brave before. <break time="300ms"/>That same capacity is still in you.

from_failure_to_data: <break time="350ms"/>What if this wasn't a failure? <break time="300ms"/>What if it was just... <break time="250ms"/>data?
<break time="300ms"/>You learned something expensive. <break time="250ms"/>That knowledge is yours now.
<break time="350ms"/>The worst thing that happened to you <break time="300ms"/>could become the best thing that shaped you.
new_chapter: <break time="300ms"/>This isn't the end of your story. <break time="250ms"/>It's the plot twist.
<break time="350ms"/>Every story needs a dark moment. <break time="300ms"/>That's where the hero transforms.

acknowledging_progress: <break time="350ms"/>Wait. <break time="300ms"/>I want to pause on that. <break time="250ms"/>You just told me something important.
<break time="300ms"/>That's not a small thing. <break time="250ms"/>That's evidence that you're moving.
<break time="350ms"/>Look how far you've come from where you started. <break time="300ms"/>Seriously. <break time="250ms"/>Look.
normalizing_setbacks: <break time="300ms"/>Setbacks don't mean you're failing. <break time="250ms"/>They mean you're in the game.
<break time="350ms"/>Two steps forward, one step back is still... <break time="300ms"/>one step forward.

resilience: <break time="350ms"/>You can't go back and change the beginning. <break time="300ms"/>But you can start where you are <break time="250ms"/>and change the ending.
<break time="300ms"/>Rock bottom can become the foundation. <break time="250ms"/>That's not a cliche. <break time="200ms"/>That's physics.
second_chances: <break time="350ms"/>Second chances are sacred. <break time="300ms"/>Not everyone gets them. <break time="250ms"/>You're getting one.
<break time="300ms"/>The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago. <break time="250ms"/>The second best time <break time="200ms"/>is now.
